# Awesome Landing Page linked source additions

Candidate list reviewed from https://github.com/nordicgiant2/awesome-landing-page.

Only directly hostable SaaS / app / developer-tool / software landing pages were added. Framework starters requiring CMS/content generation or missing refs were skipped.

Vendored repos:

- https://github.com/wonderfullandingpage/Technology-LandingPage @ 4b5120234122b5fd3c991505ab611fb55f54ce5f
- https://github.com/amiechen/codrops-scribbler @ 2bf453dd85103b080e486d795011e9eefe239b7a
- https://github.com/xriley/AppKit-Landing-Theme @ dc524f00008aa9ed0913e9389f472144eb4441b3
- https://github.com/tailwindtoolbox/Landing-Page @ 545f89eb26e0997d7cdd15fe77dda35df73e575a
- https://github.com/StartBootstrap/startbootstrap-new-age @ 5f619773a873e44545b9e1e049d6565d3a9e81d7
- https://github.com/coala/landing-frontend @ 88f354e6be4ab4c53bcf34f358bc813464fc0679
